cards.afterText: You may discard a PUNCH card. If you do, deal 1 damage to the opposing fighter and move up to 1 space.
cards.title: ALI SHUFFLE

cards.afterText: If Ali is adjacent to the opposing fighter, deal 2 damage to the opposing fighter.
cards.title: PUNCH: SLIP

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, and the opposing fighter is a sidekick, defeat that sidekick.
cards.title: CHAMPION OF THE WORLD

cards.duringText: Discard any number of PUNCH cards. For each card discarded, increase the value of this card by 1.
cards.title: THE GREATEST

cards.afterText: STING LIKE A BEE - Attack 4: If you won the combat, your opponent discards 1 random card.
cards.title: FLOAT LIKE A BUTTERFLY

cards.duringText: If the opponent did not play a defense card, this card's value is 5 instead.
cards.title: PUNCH: RIGHT CROSS

cards.immediateText: The opposing fighter can't leave their space this turn.
cards.title: PUNCH: UPPERCUT

cards.afterText: If you lost, the opponent discards the top card of their deck.
cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: ROPE A DOPE

cards.basicText: Move Ali up to 3 spaces. You may search your deck for a PUNCH card and add it to your hand. Gain 1 action.
cards.title: ANSWER THE BELL

cards.basicText:
Chose one. If you reveal THE GREATEST from your hand, do both instead: 
➤ Draw 3 cards 
➤ Recover 2 health.
cards.title: THE LOUISVILLE LIP

hero.name: MUHAMMAD ALI
hero.specialAbility: When Ali takes combat damage, you may return a JAB card from your discard pile to your hand.

sidekick.name: Sidekick
sidekick.quote: "I'm so fast that last night I turned off the light switch in my hotel room and was in bed before the room was dark."

name: Muhammad Ali
note:
Changes between the two versions after discussing with the player (DreamCarver) in the tournament:

- Rope A Dope is only a topdeck discard on loss instead of a mass discard, should be less punishing. Now base value of 2.
- Float Like a Butterfly is a 1 base instead of 2.
- Jab is now a 2 BOOST instead of a 3.
- Rope-A-Dope is now a 2 BOOST instead of a 1.
- Ali Shuffle now allows you to move up to 1 space if you trigger the effect.
- Uppercut wording now only affects the opposing fighter.
version_name: Hubaris - Alternate Version After Unofficial Legends 2 Feedback
